context: "Alice": "Hi, how are you today?""Bob": "I'm doing well, thanks! Just finished working on the project.""Alice": "That's great! How did the presentation go yesterday?""Bob": "It went really well. The client loved our proposal."

"Alice": "Did you see the news about the new AI model?""Bob": "Yes, it's amazing how fast the technology is advancing.""Alice": "I think we should incorporate it into our next project.""Bob": "Good idea. Let me research it more this week."

"Alice": "How's the research going on the new AI model?""Bob": "I've gathered a lot of information. The model has 70B parameters.""Alice": "That's impressive. What about the performance metrics?""Bob": "It outperforms GPT-4 on several benchmarks."
